godot_contract_refs.section: MechanismSpec, EventSchema, HandlerBinding, ResolverSpec, TestManifestEntry, and validator-owned maturity
P2 strict authoring schemas and target maturity checklist

known_ambiguities: The clean Section_AddSick and EventFactor sources are structural evidence for typed resolver inputs/results and an event-to-handler table only; they are not behavioral or schema-field oracles for the Godot contracts.

All five authoring schema field sets, stable cross-references, maturity levels, promotion conditions, target_maturity, and validator-owned computed_status are reviewed Godot contracts and project decisions rather than source-derived behavior.
Mechanism evidence_ids remain syntax-only positive identifiers until the later SourceEvidence catalog and source-audit join validate their provenance; they are not runtime stable-ID domain values.
Only SCENARIO uses fixture_id == test_id in this slice; every other test kind uses the zero sentinel until the fixture schema/compiler defines additional bindings.
This P2B slice authors no mechanism, event, handler, resolver, or test manifest entries and adds no runtime implementation; compiler and cross-manifest reference integration remain P2C work.
